```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement release management and changelog generation"
---
# Release Management
## Task
Implement release management with automated changelogs.
## Requirements
1. Use semantic versioning. 2. Generate changelog from commit messages.
3. Tag releases in Git. 4. Create GitHub releases with notes.
5. Automate release artifacts.
## Constraints
- Follow conventional commits. Semver for versioning. Changelog auto-generated.
## Success Criteria
- Releases versioned correctly. Changelog accurate. Artifacts published.
```
